title: T-066 — UI: FormulationEditor (RecipeScreen prototype) — ingredients table + batch/yield/price inputs (NPD-g)
prompt:
# T-066 — Formulation editor ingredients UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.1 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md recipe_screen
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx:124-264 (IngredientRow + RecipeScreen) + design/Monopilot Design System/npd/formulation-screens.jsx:79-153 (FormulationEditor)

## Goal
Client component FormulationEditor mounted at /(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]?stage=recipe with ingredients table (CRUD rows: rm_code, qty_kg, pct, costPerKg, allergen), batch/yield/target-price inputs, save-draft debounced 800 ms via saveDraft action.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/formulation-editor.tsx ('use client') uses RHF + zodResolver + shadcn Table + Input + Select for ingredient rows.
2. Add/Delete row controls; row-level validation (pct ∈ [0,100]).
3. Debounced 800 ms saveDraft on field change; loading + error toast.
4. RTL test asserts CRUD + debounce + parity vs prototype.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/formulation-editor.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/ingredient-row.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_components/__tests__/formulation-editor.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production FormulationEditor renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx:124-264 (IngredientRow + RecipeScreen) + design/Monopilot Design System/npd/formulation-screens.jsx:79-153 (FormulationEditor), then it has the same ingredient row layout (rm_code, qty_kg, pct, costPerKg, allergen) + batch/yield/target-price inputs using shadcn Table + Input + Select primitives — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist
2. Given the user types in the qty_kg input, when 800 ms elapse without further keystrokes, then saveDraft is invoked exactly once per §17.11.1 debounce contract
3. Given a row with pct=110 is entered, when blur fires, then a Zod validation error is shown inline and saveDraft is NOT called per zodResolver field validation

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/formulation-editor.test.tsx asserting parity + debounce timing + Zod inline error before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test formulation-editor'

## Risk red lines
- Do not call saveDraft on every keystroke (must debounce 800 ms)
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not use HTML <select> in place of shadcn Select
